tweet.text: RT @PabloTorre: YOU'RE TELLING ME THAT THIS WOULDN'T BE INSANELY POPULAR IF IT WAS SOLD AT BALLPARKS ACROSS AMERICA ALL THE TIME?

RT @AggieFootball: Starting off the second half strong 😤
